info.title: Klaviyo API (Beta)
info.description: The Klaviyo REST API. Please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com for more details.

get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Returns every Agent Knowledge item for the calling company, including items that are pending, indexing, indexed, failed, or rejected. To add a snippet or webpage, POST to this endpoint with the appropriate nested ``source.source_type``; upload files with the file upload endpoint.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/list_agent_knowledge_beta.json)

post.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Adds an Agent Knowledge item from either a text snippet (``source.source_type: snippet``, requires ``title`` and ``content``) or a single URL (``source.source_type: webpage``, requires ``url``). The URL is normalized before the uniqueness check; duplicate normalized URLs return ``409 Conflict``. The resource is fetchable immediately; clients can poll its ``status`` until indexing completes. For files, use ``POST /agent-knowledge-files``.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/create_agent_knowledge_beta.json)

requestBody.description: Request to create snippet-backed or webpage-backed Agent Knowledge.

get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Returns one Agent Knowledge resource by id. Resources are fetchable immediately after creation, including while pending, indexing, failed, or rejected.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/get_agent_knowledge_beta.json)

patch.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Patches editable fields on an Agent Knowledge item. For snippets, you can update ``title`` and ``content``. Re- indexing on content change is automatic.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/update_agent_knowledge_beta.json)

requestBody.description: Request to update snippet-backed Agent Knowledge.

delete.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Permanently removes the Agent Knowledge item and its indexed content. The agent will stop retrieving from it on the next turn. Conversations that previously cited this item remain unchanged.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/delete_agent_knowledge_beta.json)

post.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Uploads a file (PDF, DOCX, TXT, etc.) and indexes its contents as Agent Knowledge with ``source_type: file``. Returns the new Agent Knowledge resource immediately; clients can poll its ``status`` until indexing completes.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/create_agent_knowledge_file_beta.json)

requestBody.description: Multipart body for creating file-backed Agent Knowledge.

get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Returns one Customer Agent conversation with its status and message turns.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `3/s`
Steady: `60/m` **Scopes:** `agents:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/retrieve_customer_agent_conversation_beta.json)

patch.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Close a Customer Agent conversation. ``status`` is the only updatable attribute and only ``closed`` is accepted (the DTO's ``Literal`` constraint enforces this before this handler runs).

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `3/s`
Steady: `60/m` **Scopes:** `agents:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/update_customer_agent_conversation_beta.json)

requestBody.description:
Sparse request to update a Customer Agent conversation.

Only ``status: closed`` is accepted today — the public surface
exposes a single allowed transition (open → closed). Future statuses
will require shared billing / event-emission plumbing currently
coupled to the upstream-state-driven PUT.

get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Returns Customer Agent conversations for the calling company. Results are ordered with newest conversations first. Supports filters by ``status`` and ``created_at`` time window, plus cursor pagination for large pulls. Use to audit production behavior, spot-check escalations, or feed conversation samples back into Configure decisions.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `3/s`
Steady: `60/m` **Scopes:** `agents:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/list_customer_agent_conversations_beta.json)

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-07-15.pre/reference/api-overview#filtering
Allowed field(s)/operator(s):
`created_at`: `greater-or-equal`
`status`: `any`, `equals`

get.summary: Get Agent Message IDs for Customer Agent Conversation

get.summary: Get Agent Messages for Customer Agent Conversation
get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. List message linkage or full message resources for a conversation.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `3/s`
Steady: `60/m` **Scopes:** `agents:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/get_agent_messages_for_customer_agent_conversation_beta.json)

> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Returns the Customer Agent resource for the calling company. Includes ``name``, ``tone_of_voice`` with preset, optional custom instruction, and updated timestamp, ``escalation_rules``, and ``communication_styles``. There is one Customer Agent per company.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/get_customer_agent_beta.json)

patch.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Patches the Customer Agent resource for the calling company. The request body ``data.id`` must match the path parameter. Supports ``name``, ``tone_of_voice``, ``escalation_rules``, and ``communication_styles``. For tone, provide ``tone_of_voice.preset`` from the supported enum, or ``preset: "custom"`` together with ``custom_instruction``. For ``escalation_rules`` and ``communication_styles``, the supplied array replaces the existing list; omit the field to leave the existing list unchanged. Takes effect on the next turn.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/update_customer_agent_beta.json)

requestBody.description: JSON:API request for updating the Customer Agent resource.

post.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Sends one user message into Customer Agent and returns every public event Customer Agent emits in response. Each call is one turn: the caller supplies the conversation history with the new user message as the last entry, and Customer Agent runs one routing and response cycle against it. The response is non-streaming; the caller receives the entire event list at once and renders it in order. Continue an existing conversation by passing the optional ``conversation`` relationship; omit it to start a new one.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/create_customer_agent_response_beta.json)

requestBody.description:
JSON:API request for running Customer Agent for one conversation
turn.

get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Lists every secret configured for the calling company. Returns secret metadata (name, mask, timestamps) and never the plaintext value, which cannot be read back after creation.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/get_agent_secrets_beta.json)

post.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Creates a secret for use by one or more Customer Agent tools. The provided plaintext ``value`` is encrypted before persistence and is never exposed after creation. Subsequent responses return only the ``mask`` (last 3 characters) and non-sensitive metadata. Secret names are trimmed of leading and trailing whitespace before validation, and both the resulting ``name`` and provided ``value`` must be non-empty. If another secret already exists with the same name for the calling company, the API returns ``409 Conflict``.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/create_agent_secret_beta.json)

requestBody.description: Request to create an Agent Secret for use by Customer Agent tools.

get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Returns metadata for one secret: name, mask, and timestamps. The plaintext value is never returned.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/get_agent_secret_beta.json)

patch.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Renames the secret and/or rotates its ``value``. Rotating the value re-encrypts the secret at rest; every tool that references this secret picks up the new value automatically without per-tool reconfiguration.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/update_agent_secret_beta.json)

requestBody.description: Request to rename an Agent Secret or rotate its value.

delete.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Permanently removes the secret. Tools that reference this secret by alias will fail to authenticate on their next call until the alias is rebound to a different secret.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/delete_agent_secret_beta.json)

get.summary: Get Tool IDs for Agent Secret
get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. List agent tool resource identifiers or full resources for a secret.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/get_tool_ids_for_agent_secret_beta.json)

> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. List agent tool resource identifiers or full resources for a secret.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/get_tools_for_agent_secret_beta.json)

> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Returns every skill configured for the calling company's Customer Agent. Use this to inspect Customer Agent's current skills before adding or modifying a custom skill. Each item carries a prefixed ``id``, ``source``, ``name``, ``display_name``, ``description``, ``instructions``, bound ``agent-tools`` relationship data, ``status``, and ``handoff``. Use retrieve to inspect any one skill in detail.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/get_agent_skills_beta.json)

post.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Adds a skill to Customer Agent. Customer Agent will invoke this skill when the customer message matches its ``description``. Provide ``display_name``, ``description`` (summary of the skill's capabilities and when it should be used), ``instructions`` (the system prompt the skill uses to handle a turn), optional ``handoff`` (escalation behavior), optional ``agent-tools`` relationship data, and ``status``. Set ``status: draft`` to stage without going live, ``live`` to activate immediately. Customer Agent generates the skill name and returns a prefixed custom id plus the generated ``name`` attribute.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/create_agent_skill_beta.json)

requestBody.description: Request to create a routable Customer Agent skill.

get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Returns full detail for a single skill: ``name``, ``display_name``, ``description``, ``instructions``, bound ``agent-tools`` relationship data, ``status``, and ``handoff``. Skills are looked up by prefixed ``id``. To list all skills, use ``GET /agent-skills``.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/get_agent_skill_beta.json)

patch.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Patches one or more fields on an existing skill: ``display_name``, ``description``, ``instructions``, ``status``, ``handoff``, and the ``agent-tools`` relationship. To rebind tools, send a new ``agent-tools`` relationship list; this is a full replacement, not merged. Skills are looked up by prefixed ``id``. Use ``status: draft`` to pause a custom skill.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/update_agent_skill_beta.json)

requestBody.description: Sparse request to update a Customer Agent skill.

delete.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Permanently removes the skill from Customer Agent. Past conversations routed to this skill are unchanged; future conversations cannot route to it. To disable without deletion, use ``PATCH /agent-skills/{id}`` with ``status: draft``.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/delete_agent_skill_beta.json)

post.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Returns per-skill aggregates across the requested timeframe. Each row of ``results`` is one skill bucket with a computed ``volume`` statistic. Counts are at the invocation level: one conversation that runs multiple skills contributes to multiple buckets.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `3/s`
Steady: `60/m` **Scopes:** `agents:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/query_customer_agent_skill_values_beta.json)

requestBody.description: Request body for the skill-values-report endpoint.

post.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Adds a new external HTTP tool Customer Agent skills can call. Provide protocol details (method, URL, query parameter, header, and body templates using Jinja-style ``{{variable_name}}`` syntax) and declare the variables those templates reference. The runtime uses ``variables`` to determine which values are supplied at call time. To reference a secret, include a variable with ``source: secret`` and ``value`` set to the ``agent- secret`` id. The tool isn't directly callable until bound to a skill with ``PATCH /agent-skills/{id}``.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/create_agent_tool_beta.json)

requestBody.description:
Request to create an external HTTP tool Customer Agent skills can
call.

get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Returns every external tool (HTTP API endpoint) Customer Agent skills can call. Each tool has an id, display name, protocol details (method, URL template), authentication setup, and any referenced secrets. Use this before creating a new tool to avoid duplicates, or before binding a tool to a skill to confirm the tool exists.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/get_agent_tools_beta.json)

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-07-15.pre/reference/api-overview#filtering
Allowed field(s)/operator(s):
`name`: `contains`
`tool_type`: `equals`
`created_at`: `equals`, `greater-or-equal`, `less-or-equal`
`updated_at`: `equals`, `greater-or-equal`, `less-or-equal`

get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Returns full configuration for a single tool: protocol, auth method, templated request configuration, variables, and referenced secrets. Use to inspect a tool's setup before referencing it from a skill or modifying its config.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/get_agent_tool_beta.json)

patch.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Patches the tool's config in place: protocol, templated request configuration, variables, auth, and referenced secrets. All skills bound to this tool pick up the new behavior immediately on next call.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/update_agent_tool_beta.json)

requestBody.description: Sparse request to update an external HTTP tool.

delete.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Permanently removes the tool. Skills that referenced it lose the binding; Customer Agent will not be able to use that tool with those skills until it is rebound.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `agents:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/delete_agent_tool_beta.json)

get.summary: Get Skill IDs for Agent Tool

post.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Returns conversation-level aggregates across the requested timeframe. A single call may request multiple ``statistics`` (``volume`` and/or ``resolution-rate``); each row of ``results`` carries the bucket-identifying ``groupings`` values and computed ``statistics`` for that bucket. Optionally group by ``channel`` or ``status``, or omit ``groupings`` for a single overall row.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `3/s`
Steady: `60/m` **Scopes:** `agents:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/query_customer_agent_values_beta.json)

requestBody.description: Request body for the values-report endpoint.

source.description: Source payload for the new item. `snippet` requires `title` and `content`; `webpage` requires `url` and does not accept caller-provided content. To upload a file, use `POST /agent-knowledge-files`.

source_type.description: The knowledge item was created from an uploaded file.

title.description: Human-readable title for the file-backed knowledge item.

source.description: Source payload for the knowledge item.

status.description: Indexing lifecycle state for the knowledge item.

created_at.description: Date and time when the knowledge item was created.

updated_at.description: Date and time when the knowledge item was last updated.

indexed_at.description: Date and time when indexing completed, if available.

error.description: Error message when indexing failed; otherwise null.

id.description: Unique Agent Knowledge identifier.

source_type.description: Create a text snippet from caller-provided content.
The knowledge item was created from caller-provided content.

content.description: Text body for the snippet. Re-indexing is automatic when changed.

id.description: Agent Knowledge identifier. This must match the `agent_knowledge_id` path parameter.

title.description: Human-readable title for the file-backed knowledge item.

file.description: File to upload and index as Agent Knowledge.

source_type.description: Create a webpage-backed knowledge source from a URL.

scope.description: Crawl scope for the webpage. `single-page` indexes only the given URL; `entire-site` crawls URLs listed in the site's root sitemap.

auto_reindex.description: Whether to periodically re-index the webpage.

source_type.description: The knowledge item was created from a webpage.

url.description: Normalized URL for the webpage-backed knowledge item.

scope.description: Crawl scope for the webpage-backed knowledge item.

auto_reindex.description: Whether the webpage is periodically re-indexed.

name.description: Display name for the secret. Leading and trailing whitespace is stripped before validation; the resulting name must be non-empty. Not the alias used in tool configs.

value.description: Plaintext secret value. Must be non-empty. Encrypted prior to persistence and never returned in any response.

mask.description: Last 3 characters of the plaintext value, for visual disambiguation. The plaintext itself is never returned.

created_at.description: Date and time when the secret was created.

updated_at.description: Date and time when the secret was last updated.

id.description: Agent Secret identifier.
Agent tool IDs that reference this secret.
Agent Secret identifier.
Agent Secret identifier.

name.description: Display name for the secret. Leading and trailing whitespace is stripped before validation; the resulting name must be non-empty.

value.description: Plaintext secret value. Setting this field rotates the secret; all tools referencing it pick up the new value automatically.

id.description: Agent Secret identifier.

display_name.description: Human-readable name shown for the skill.

description.description: Summary of the skill's capabilities and when Customer Agent should use it.

instructions.description: System prompt the skill uses to handle a turn.

status.description: Lifecycle status for a custom skill. Use `draft` to stage without going live and `live` to activate.

handoff.description: Optional escalation behavior for this skill.

id.description: Agent tool IDs this skill can call.

status.description: Lifecycle status for a custom skill. Use `draft` to pause the skill and `live` to activate it.

id.description: Skill identifier. This must match the `id` path parameter.
Full replacement list of agent-tool IDs bound to this skill. Values are not merged.

name.description: Machine key used in instruction tokens and merged into raw input.

label.description: End-user facing label shown in the configuration UI.

description.description: Optional help text rendered alongside the UI control.

input_type.description: UI control type. Values are persisted as list[str].

required.description: Whether the configuration parameter is required.

type.description: Create detail variant for custom HTTPS tools.

protocol.description: Message protocol for the tool. `https` is currently supported.

variables.description: Template variables referenced by the URL, query parameters, headers, or body. To reference a secret, include a variable with `source: secret` and `value` set to the `agent-secret` id.

timeout_seconds.description: Overall tool execution timeout in seconds. Must be greater than 0 and at most 10.

max_retries.description: Maximum retry attempts for the tool call. Must be between 0 and 3.

request_timeout_seconds.description: Outbound request timeout in seconds. Must be greater than 0 and at most 10.

headers.description: Outbound HTTP headers. Values may use Jinja-style variables such as `{{api_key}}`; for secrets, declare a variable with `source: secret` and reference it by name in the template.

body_template.description: JSON request body template. String values may use Jinja-style variables such as `{{order_id}}`.

name.description: Human-facing display name for the tool.

public_description.description: Public description of the tool and when Customer Agent should use it.

details.description: Sparse custom HTTPS tool configuration details.

id.description: Agent Tool identifier. This must match the `tool_id` path parameter.

required.description: Whether the variable is required when the tool is called.

description.description: Optional description of the variable for agent/tool-call context.

source.description: Where the variable value is resolved from. `dynamic` values are supplied at tool-call time. `klaviyo` values reference a Klaviyo-provided value with `value` set to that reference id. `secret` values reference an `agent-secret` with `value` set to the secret id.

value.description: Reference value for non-dynamic variables. For `source: secret`, this is the `agent-secret` id. For `source: klaviyo`, this is the Klaviyo reference id. For `source: dynamic`, omit this field or set it to null.

required.description: Whether the variable is required when the tool is called.

description.description: Optional description of the variable for agent/tool-call context.

source.description: Where the variable value is resolved from. `dynamic` values are supplied at tool-call time. `klaviyo` values reference a Klaviyo-provided value with `value` set to that reference id. `secret` values reference an `agent-secret` with `value` set to the secret id.

value.description: Reference value for non-dynamic variables. For `source: secret`, this is the `agent-secret` id. For `source: klaviyo`, this is the Klaviyo reference id. For `source: dynamic`, omit this field or set it to null.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the conversation.

created_at.description: Date and time when the conversation was created.

updated_at.description: Date and time when the conversation was last updated.

id.description: Conversation identifier.
Message turns in this conversation.

title.description: Short, human-readable label for the communication style.

description.description: Natural-language communication style the agent must follow on every turn.

status.description: Whether this guidance item is active.

title.description: Short, human-readable label for the communication style.

description.description: Natural-language communication style the agent must follow on every turn.

status.description: Whether this guidance item is active.

title.description: Short, human-readable label for the escalation rule.

description.description: Natural-language description of when this rule fires.

status.description: Whether this guidance item is active.

title.description: Short, human-readable label for the escalation rule.

description.description: Natural-language description of when this rule fires.

status.description: Whether this guidance item is active.

name.description: The name of the AI agent.

tone_of_voice.description: Tone-of-voice settings for the Customer Agent resource.

escalation_rules.description: Natural-language triggers that, when matched, cause the agent to escalate to a human. Each rule is individually enabled or disabled.

communication_styles.description: Global communication styles the agent applies on every turn, such as opening conventions, formatting preferences, and word choices to avoid. Each style is individually enabled or disabled.

mode.description: Whether the response is for testing or a real shopper interaction. `preview` responses are not billed and are excluded from production conversations and metrics. `live` responses count toward billing, Customer Agent conversations, and production metrics.

channel.description: Channel whose response conventions the agent should use, such as SMS terseness, email greetings and sign-offs, or web-chat formatting. This does not route or send the response through that channel; the caller delivers the output. Optional; defaults to `web-chat`.

messages.description: Conversation history for this turn. The final message must have `role: user`.

customer.description: Optional public customer identity for this conversation.

id.description: Conversation to continue. Omit to start a new conversation; the server generates and returns a UUID.

conversation_id.description: Conversation id continued or created by this turn.

events.description: Ordered public events emitted by Customer Agent for this turn.

id.description: Customer Agent response id. This is the same value as `conversation_id`.
Conversation continued or created by this turn.
Customer Agent resource id.

statistics.description: Metrics to compute for each skill bucket. Currently only volume is supported.

groupings.description: Required grouping. Each result row corresponds to one skill.

filter.description: Optional Klaviyo filter syntax. Use any(skill,[...]) to narrow to specific skills; use any(channel,[...]) to narrow by channel. When omitted, returns aggregates for every skill the company has used in the timeframe.

id.description: Opaque identifier for the skill-values report response.

custom_instruction.description: Free-text instruction the agent uses for tone when `preset` is `custom`. Ignored otherwise.

updated_at.description: Date and time when the tone-of-voice configuration was last updated.

custom_instruction.description: Free-text instruction the agent uses for tone when `preset` is `custom`. Ignored otherwise.

name.description: The name of the AI agent.

tone_of_voice.description: Patchable tone-of-voice settings for the Customer Agent resource.

escalation_rules.description: Natural-language triggers that, when matched, cause the agent to escalate to a human. When provided, the supplied array replaces the existing list; omit to leave the existing list unchanged.

communication_styles.description: Global communication styles the agent applies on every turn. When provided, the supplied array replaces the existing list; omit to leave the existing list unchanged.

id.description: Customer Agent resource id. Must match the `id` path parameter.

statistics.description: Metrics to compute for each grouping bucket. Combine volume and resolution-rate in one call to receive both per bucket.

groupings.description: Optional dimension to break the result down by. Provide exactly one of channel or status, or omit entirely for a single aggregate row.

id.description: Opaque identifier for the values report response.

role.description: Author of a message in a Customer Agent conversation.

created_at.description: Date and time when the message was created.

updated_at.description: Date and time when the message was last updated.

id.description: Message identifier.
Message identifier.

start.description: ISO-8601 lower-bound (inclusive) for the report window.

end.description: ISO-8601 upper-bound (exclusive) for the report window.

SkillGrouping.description:
Required bucket dimension supported by the skill-values report.

The spec requires exactly one grouping, and it must be ``skill``.

SkillStatistic.description: Metrics computable for each skill bucket.

groupings.description: Bucket-identifying values for this row. Empty when the request omits groupings for a single aggregate row.

statistics.description: Computed metrics for this row. Only the statistics named in the request appear here.

ValuesGrouping.description:
Optional dimensions that can break down conversation values-report
    rows.

ValuesStatistic.description: Metrics computable for each conversation values-report bucket.

Klaviyo-API-Key.name: Authorization
Klaviyo-API-Key.description:
Private key authentication for /api/ endpoints is performed by setting the `Authorization` header to `Klaviyo-API-Key your-private-api-key`
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-07-15.pre/reference/api-overview#authentication
